Hero.Subtitle: RyoGo helps travel agencies and tour operators manage their bookings, fleet, drivers, and daily operations online without any hassle or paperwork

Features.Title: Designed for speed and efficiency
Features.Subtitle: Ditch the spreadsheets. Our integrated app handles every aspect of your travel business from booking to managing your fleet.

F1.Title: Easy Booking Management
F1.Description: Book your trips in just a few clicks with our intuitive interface. Track all your trips in real-time. Our central hub ensures no itinerary falls through the cracks.

F2.Title: Driver Communication
F2.Description: Integrated driver tracking and communication built for fast-moving agencies. Drivers can track their trips, add expenses and receive updates all in real-time.

F3.Title: Fleet Scheduling
F3.Description: Real-time status monitoring and availability tracking for your entire vehicle fleet, from cars to buses.

F4.Title: Smart Analytics
F4.Description: Get deep insights into your revenue, fleet and driver efficiency, and peak travel periods with automated charts and reports.

Working.Title: Works like a charm
Working.Subtitle: RyoGo makes your daily business operations simple and efficient. Try it out and decide for yourself.

W0.Title: Onboard fleet
W0.Description: Manage your entire operations from one place by adding your vehicles, drivers and agents.

W1.Title: Create bookings
W1.Description: Easily add new customer bookings. Assign vehicles and drivers with the help of our AI suggestions.

W2.Title: Connect with drivers
W2.Description: Sync up on what's happening on the road. Enable your drivers to fulfill the trip from their app.

W3.Title: Share with customers
W3.Description: Provide real-time updates to your customers via WhatsApp and send professional messages and invoices.

W4.Title: Reconcile operations
W4.Description: Review transactions, expenses and status for each booking to make sure everything is in order.

W5.Title: Stay in control
W5.Description: Receive alerts, notifications and plan with the help of analytics to keep your business running smoothly.

We can now focus more on growing our business and providing excellent service to our customers, rather than getting bogged down by administrative tasks.

Management.Title: Manage agency like a pro
Management.Subtitle: Run your entire travel business operations with ease.. from a unified operations desk.

M1.Title: Control entire fleet digitally
M1.Description: Manage vehicles, drivers and agents with all their details under a single roof. Seamlessly add and control their entire lifecycle.

M2.Title: Role-based task delegation
M2.Description: Let the various users (agents and drivers) login separately into their accounts and handle the day-to-day operations assigned to them.

M3.Title: Stay in the loop
M3.Description: Get smart suggestions and real-time updates so that, as the owner, you can always plan one step ahead.

M4.Title: Automated workflows
M4.Description: Focus on the essential things like high-level business decisions and let RyoGo handle the daily chores.

M5.Title: Centralize customer database
M5.Description: Find customer's history or add new customers easily. Retrieve customer details with just a phone number at the time of booking.

M6.Title: Status whiteboard in a glance
M6.Description: Instantly see which vehicle or driver is on trip, idle, or in the workshop or on leave. All automatically updated.

Scheduling.Title: Scheduling has never been so easy
Scheduling.Subtitle: Create and manage bookings with the help of smart suggestions.. for absolute peace of mind.

S1.Title: Seamless booking management
S1.Description: Track all upcoming or ongoing bookings on a chart. Get extensive workflows and real-time updates so that there are no cracks in the itinerary.

S2.Title: Conflict-free assignment
S2.Description: Get interactive visualizations that instantly flags double-bookings or overlapping conflicts, keeping the schedule clean.

S3.Title: Guided booking creation
S3.Description: Never be stuck on a call with customer when taking a new booking. Our guided flow provides all the information at your fingertips.

S4.Title: Designed with flexibility in mind
S4.Description: Choose from various booking options and customizations as per requirements, while also tracking allowances, transactions and expenses effortlessly.

S5.Title: Brilliant pocket assistant
S5.Description: Receive intelligent recommendations (like RyoGo score for assignment) based on multiple factors to lower costs while maximizing revenue from every booking.

Communication.Title: Built for communication and collaboration
Communication.Subtitle: Keep drivers, agents, and end customers completely aligned. Anytime, anywhere.

C1.Title: Inter-connected system
C1.Description: Get live trip status updates for each booking, so that everyone involved is always in the loop.

C2.Title: WhatsApp integration
C2.Description: Remove the friction of endless phone calls and messages, with a single platform to initiate all your agency conversations.

C3.Title: Driver Web App
C3.Description: Drivers can manage their bookings with an easy-to-use web app, allowing them to start/end trips with odometer numbers directly on their phones.

C4.Title: Engage customers
C4.Description: Share timely updates, booking confirmations and invoices with customers for a delightful experience.

Analytics.Title: Stay ahead with data analysis
Analytics.Subtitle: Make decisions based on real data, not guesswork. Uncover exactly what is working and how to improve business metrics.

A1.Title: Revenue and expenses snapshot
A1.Description: Track earnings versus fuel, maintenance, and driver costs, pinpointing exactly which entities are impacting profits.

A2.Title: Improve business performance
A2.Description: Keep an eye on vehicles, drivers, agents activities and utilizations. Optimize fleet for maximum efficiency.

A3.Title: Integrated intelligence
A3.Description: Get data-driven insights, recommendations and tips to help with operations planning. Download reports and conduct your own analysis.

A4.Title: Dynamic forecasting
A4.Description: Analyze historical trends to predict upcoming seasonal volume spikes, so that you can price bookings optimally.

Alerts.Title: Timely alerts and notifications
Alerts.Subtitle: Run schedule perfectly without any last minute blockers. Get highlights of exactly what needs immediate attention.

A1.Title: Localized mission control
A1.Description: Know about upcoming deadlines like license expirations, vehicle maintenance proactively, so that every trip can start smoothly.

A2.Title: Discover activity feed
A2.Description: Don't waste time calling around to figure out what happened. Every user can see updates about each activity with agency-wide notification feed.

A3.Title: Record every detail
A3.Description: Review and reconcile every booking with the help of transactions, expenses and trip logs to confirm and close the loop for every journey.

A4.Title: Finer controls for every detail
A4.Description: Add driver leave or vehicle repair reminders. Or just create custom reminders for any task.

Security.Title: Top-notch security is our top priority
Security.Subtitle: RyoGo is built with the latest safety standards and security protocols to ensure that your data is protected and private forever.

S1.Title: Safe and private data
S1.Description: Enterprise-grade security to protect sensitive customer identities, booking information, and financial statements with absolute privacy. Data is never shared with other agencies or any third party.

S2.Title: Built-in system corrections
S2.Description: Zero chance of fraud or malicious activity. Every workflow has automated checks and balances to ensure smooth operations without scope of any foulplay.

S3.Title: Total Auditability
S3.Description: Never be afraid of data corruption. Track every single action, edit, adjustment, or override back to the specific user.

S4.Title: Easy to signup and login
S4.Description: Create a new agency account in just 5 minutes with a phone number and basic details. Securely login to your RyoGo account with just a password.

FAQ.Title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Subtitle: Still got any queries related to RyoGo features? Don't worry.. We will help you out.

Reassign.Question: Can owner re-assign bookings?
Reassign.Answer: Yes, owner can re-assign a booking to any other agent or himself. A new booking is assigned to the user who created it by default but can be reassigned to someone else by the owner if needed. Similarly, a vehicle or driver assigned to a booking can also be changed untill the trip starts.

PWA.Question: Do drivers need to download a heavy mobile app from the Play Store or App Store?
PWA.Answer: No. Drivers can use RyoGo with a lightweight Progressive Web App (PWA) that runs directly inside a smartphone browser. It works beautifully even on low-end devices and uses minimal mobile data. Infact, the agents and owner can also download this web app and login to their accounts from their smartphones.

AccessAnalytics.Question: Can drivers or agents see the revenue metrics or analytics?
AccessAnalytics.Answer: No. Only the owner has access revenue and advanced analytics pages. Agents can see basic charts and insights required for everyday operations and booking management. Drivers have no access to the dashboard.

Alerts.Question: How do we get alerted about vehicle document, driver license expirations or insurance renewals, etc. without manually checking every day?
Alerts.Answer: RyoGo dynamically checks for such expiration alerts in real-time and adds them to Mission Control. Critical alerts will also be highlighted on your dashboard.

Conflict.Question: When creating a new booking, do we get to know if a vehicle or driver is available or already assigned to another booking?
Conflict.Answer: Yes, the system clearly flags that a driver or vehicle has a conflicting schedule for the days selected in a new booking. This is one of the biggest advantages of using RyoGo.

Status.Question: How will I know which all trips will start or complete soon?
Status.Answer: All ongoing trips are displayed in the dashboard. Any upcoming, completed trips and even open leads are also listed on the bookings page. You can also view all the trips in a calendar view.

Payment.Question: Is customer booking payment also handled by RyoGo?
Payment.Answer: No, RyoGo is not a booking platform or a middleman between customers and travel agencies. We are here to help travel agencies and fleet operators run their operations more efficiently by centralizing all information and provide insights. However, we do help you in sharing documents, invoices and updates with customers online.

TripSheet.Question: Do I need to send trip sheet or any other information to driver on WhatsApp?
TripSheet.Answer: No, driver can just login from his account and view all the assigned trips along with their details.

BookingConfirmation.Question: How do customers receive booking confirmation or invoices for their trips?
BookingConfirmation.Answer: On the booking details page, you can click 'Send Confirmation'. This will open WhatsApp chat with the customer directly with the document attached. You just need to press send in WhatsApp.

TrackingLink.Question: Customers keep asking where is the vehicle? How does RyoGo help?
TrackingLink.Answer: Although there is no login for customers in RyoGo, you can send a tracking link to the customer on WhatsApp. Customers can then view live trip status on their phones.

Languages.Question: What languages are supported?
Languages.Answer: RyoGo is available in English and Hindi. We will be adding more languages soon.

LeaveRepair.Question: A driver has to go on leave or a vehicle will be in repair. How can I make sure they are not assigned during those dates?
LeaveRepair.Answer: RyoGo provides an option to add driver leave or vehicle repair dates. The system will flag them during booking assignment.

Transactions.Question: Customer made advance payment or paid some amount to the driver during the trip. Or the agency gave some cash to the driver before the trip started. How do I keep track of all these transactions?
Transactions.Answer: In RyoGo, you can easily add all these money 'Transactions' for a booking and review them at the end of the trip. Final invoice will also be adjusted automatically.

Expenses.Question: Driver sometimes pay for trip out of their pocket like fuel, parking, toll etc. How do I keep track of them and adjust them in invoice?
Expenses.Answer: Assigned agent or even the driver can simply add them as 'Expenses' to a booking. Final invoice will also be adjusted automatically.

DataPrivacy.Question: Will my agency or customer data be shared with other businesses?
DataPrivacy.Answer: Absolutely not. All your data is kept secured and private in RyoGo. We will not share your data with any third party or other businesses. Now or in the future.

FAQ.Title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Subtitle: Get answers to all your pricing related queries here

TrialEnd.Question: What happens at the end of my free trial?
TrialEnd.Answer: At the end of your free Premium trial period, your account will switch to Basic plan. You can upgrade to Premium plan at any time later.

Upgrade.Question: How do I upgrade to the Premium plan?
Upgrade.Answer: After creating an account, you can choose to upgrade to the Premium plan by buying our subscription from the subscription page in your account settings. For any help, contact our support team at {contact}

PaymentMethod.Question: What payment methods do you accept? Is it safe and secure
PaymentMethod.Answer: We work with Razorpay to accept payments through various methods including UPI, cards, net banking, and digital wallets. All payments are processed securely using SSL encryption.

Cancel.Question: Can I cancel my Premium subscription?
Cancel.Answer: No. Once bought, you cannot cancel your subscription. However, when current subscription period expires, your account will be automatically downgraded to Basic plan.

DataDowngrade.Question: What happens to all my excess data like additional vehicles and drivers if I do not renew my Premium subscription?
DataDowngrade.Answer: All your saved data is retained with us forever. However, under Basic plan only limited number of entities are available for booking assignments. Refer to the comparision table above.

SpecialPricing.Question: We are a non-profit travel organisation, is there any special pricing available?
SpecialPricing.Answer: For any genuine special pricing needs, please contact our support team at {contact}

E0.Title: Manage vehicles, drivers and agents
E0.Description: Add, remove or edit your vehicle, driver and agent details in just a few clicks.. all in one place

E1.Title: Stay compliant

E2.Title: Get expiry reminders

DriverApp.Subtitle: RyoGo comes with a dedicated web app for drivers that provides real-time trip status monitoring, communication and much more.

D0.Title: Invite driver
D0.Description: When you onboard a new driver to your agency, they are invited to join RyoGo and login to their account from their phone.

D1.Title: Driver's job made easy
D1.Description: Drivers can track their ongoing trips, navigate to pickup/drop locations and receive new assignments all in real-time.

D2.Title: Add Expenses on the go
D2.Description: Drivers can add expenses like toll, parking, fuel which they paid from their pocket. After approval, they will be automatically adjusted in the final invoice

D3.Title: Know your vehicle
D3.Description: Drivers can view information about the assigned vehicle along with access to necessary documents like RC, insurance and PUC on their fingertips.

D4.Title: Update trip status
D4.Description: Whenever driver makes a move, the trip status is reflected on agency dashboard. So that everyone in the agency knows what's happening on the road.

D5.Title: Protections from fraud
D5.Description: Every driver action is automatically logged, checked and verified for fraud. So that your final billing calculation is always accurate.

Customers.Title: Customer-first experience
Customers.Subtitle: Always stay connected with your customers and provice a premium experience.

C0.Title: Simple customer management
C0.Description: Add and manage customers with basic details and remarks.. no verification required. Data is always safe and private with us.

C1.Title: Keep customer updated
C1.Description: Send regular trip status updates to your customers via WhatsApp chat and a live tracking link.

C2.Title: Share booking documents
C2.Description: Easily send professional booking quotations, confirmations, and invoices to your customers via Whatsapp

C3.Title: Get paid online
C3.Description: Final invoice can be customized to have your payment link or QR code so that the customer can directly send money online to your account. RyoGo takes no cut here.

C4.Title: Track customer transactions
C4.Description: Add transactions like advance payments made by customers in a booking. RyoGo will automatically adjust them in the final invoice.

Customers.Disclaimer: Please note that RyoGo is only an agency workflow management app. We are not a money-transfer booking or payment platform. Any transactions happening between the agency and its customers are their mutual responsibility and are not covered by RyoGo in any capacity.

Missions.Title: Platform built for preparedness
Missions.Subtitle: Get notified of alerts or notifications so that everyone is always ready to take action.

M0.Title: Receive task alerts
M0.Description: Every user receives actionable alerts targeted for their assigned bookings and tasks.

M1.Title: Get expiry alerts
M1.Description: Any license about to expire? No need to worry. RyoGo will automatically notify you.

M2.Title: Set customer reminders
M2.Description: Miss nothing with scheduled reminders. Know at the right time to take action.

M3.Title: Real-time notifications
M3.Description: No need to call others to know what's hapenning. Everyone in the agency can see updates in their notification feed.

FAQ.Title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Subtitle: Have any more confusion about how RyoGo works? We've got you covered.

OnboardingTime.Question: How long does it take to get our agency up and running on the platform?
OnboardingTime.Answer: You can go live in under 10 minutes. Onboarding is a simple 5-step process: you input your basic business details, verify your account, then add a vehicle, driver, and agent. That's it! No credit card, long form or complicated formalities.

Entities.Question: What are 'Entities' in the system, and how do they relate to my physical business?
Entities.Answer: Entities are the digital mapping of your physical business. RyoGo mainly tracks 4 entities: Vehicles (Your cars/buses/vans/bikes with their registration numbers, model, documents and rates per Km), Drivers (with phone numbers, address, license details, and allowance per day), Agents (with phone number) and Bookings (with customer and trip details).

TechnicalKnowledge.Question: Do I need to know any techical knowledge to use RyoGo?
TechnicalKnowledge.Answer: Not at all. RyoGo is designed for simplicity and speed. You just need to add vehicles, drivers and start creating bookings (with our guidance). We will handle the rest.

WithoutComputer.Question: Can my agency use RyoGo without any computer?
WithoutComputer.Answer: Absolutely, you can use RyoGo on your smartphones with internet. You can either open RyoGo in your browser just like any other website or download the RyoGo web app on your phone.

NoAgent.Question: Can I use RyoGo without any agent?
NoAgent.Answer: Yes, absolutely. Adding agents is optional. Owners can themselves do everything in RyoGo. But delegating tasks to other agents is recommended if you want to grow your business.

DriverActions.Question: What all can a driver do in RyoGo?
DriverActions.Answer: Driver can view assigned bookings, call customer, update trip status in single clicks (like arrived at location, customer picked up, dropped, etc), add expenses, view past bookings, view assigned vehcile details, initiate chat with agent, etc. All actions are review by the system for fraud or malpractice.

AgentActions.Question: What all can an agent do in RyoGo?
AgentActions.Answer: Agent can add vehicles, drivers and customers, create and manage bookings, share trip details with customer, assign driver/vehicle, add transactions and expenses.

NewBooking.Question: How is a new booking created? Explain in detail.
NewBooking.Answer: New booking is created in 5 easy steps and it takes less than a minute with system guidance. First, the customer is selected or added using a phone number. Second, trip details (location, date, type, etc.) are selected. Third, driver and vehicle are assigned (optional). Fourth, trip costs (vehicle rate, driver allowance, agency commission, etc.) are input, if not already prefilled. Finally, overall trip summary can be reviewed to create the booking. Please note that, a bew booking is created as a lead and must be confirmed by the agent.

FAQ.Title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Subtitle: Did not find what you were looking for? Check out FAQs to get more answers.

Training.Question: Do you provide training resources or material that we can hand over directly to our drivers or agents?
Training.Answer: We do have demo videos and guides for users to understand how RyoGo works. These resources can help them in their day to day operations. All such resources can be found in Help section under their account after login. Alternatively, you can find all such training videos and more on our YouTube channel as well.

FeatureRequest.Question: Can we request a specific guide, calculator, or any other feature if it isn't currently in the system?
FeatureRequest.Answer: We would love to build it for you. Our goal is to make RyoGo the definitive app for travel agencies and fleet operators countrywide. Drop in your suggestions in the support center.

Language.Question: How do I change the language in RyoGo?
Language.Answer: Here, you can change the language from menu bar. If you are logged in, you can change the language in your account settings.
